segments.text: This incredible new Lego smart brick is
full of new tech and it's going to bring
my Lego set to life in a totally new
way. This is the biggest innovation in
Lego bricks in my lifetime, and I love
Lego sets. So, here we go. So, first you
build the new Lego Star Wars smart play
sets, just like we all know and love.
And then to play with it, you add the
special smart brick, smart tag, and
smart minifigures, which means for the
first time ever, the Lego Star Wars
galaxy will come alive.
Inside the Smart Brick, there's a
gyroscope sensor that knows its
orientation. So that when I do this,
it's got a distance sensor to know how
far from the Smart Minifigures it is. So
that when I do this,
and it's even got a color sensor to know
what it's next to. This feels like even
more of what I've always loved about
LEGO sets. how they spark your
imagination, how they immerse you in
stories without screens, and you can
play again and again. Now, I really want
to build this one, but I'm saving it to
give to the kids in my life that I love.
If you want one for a kid that you love
or for yourself, check out LEGO Smart
